subcodes.first_line: O true and merciful friends! At that dawning hour when the Sun of Truth rose above the horizon of creation upon the temples of the nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای حقیقی رحمانی در آن صبحدم که شمس حقیقت از افق عالم بر هیاکل امم
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @love as fire, @Manifestation of God as sun
